'''Carlinson''' was a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] and contemporary of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]]. Carlinson was believed to be either politically well-connected or extremely competent enough to be able to receive as many as fifteen additional [[Warship/Legends|warship]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] to augment the Moff's [[Sector Group/Legends|Sector Group]].
